mano_cua.result_summary: AnimatedTooltip 组件已渲染并可交互，但 tooltip 弹出框存在水平位置对齐 Bug——tooltip 气泡框始终偏移到目标头像元素右侧约 40～100px 处，未能正确居中对齐在被悬停的目标元素正上方。测试了 4 个头像，偏移量分别为 +79px、+99px、+73px、+40px。
mano_cua.last_reasoning:
Now hovering at x=710, y=510, the tooltip shows "Tyler Durden / Soap Developer" centered at approximately x=783, y=447.

Summary of all tests:
| Avatar | Cursor X | Tooltip Center X | Offset |
|--------|----------|-----------------|--------|
| John Doe (1st) | ~548 | ~627 | +79px right |
| Robert Johnson (2nd) | ~590 | ~689 | +99px right |
| Tyler Durden (5th) | ~710 | ~783 | +73px right |
| Dora/6th | ~755 | ~795 | +40px right |

The tooltip is consistently offset to the right compared to the target avatar. It should be centered above the hovered avatar, but instead it appears displaced to the right by approximately 40-100 pixels.

This is a clear positioning/alignment bug in the AnimatedTooltip component. The tooltip popup is not correctly centered above the target element - it is misaligned to the right of the hovered avatar.
